texts.content: {"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 5], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "提到新西兰"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 24], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "大家先想到的总是雪山、海湾和那种被反复讲述的纯净"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 17], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "但真正开始这趟穿越时，先落到眼前的"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "不是 postcard"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 21], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是航站楼、租车场和必须立刻适应的左舵路感"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "刚出发这个车它就坏了"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "然后现在要换一辆车来挤"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这个形成的开始就是这么的专门"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "还没真正沉浸在目的地滤镜里"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 17], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "停车场和陌生路权就先把人拽回了现场"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "从这一刻起，我想看的已经不是它有多美"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是这片土地会怎样逼你做判断"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 4], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "很多年里"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 16], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "我认识新西兰都来自图像和名字本身"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "但真正落地之后，你会发现"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这里不是一组等着被看的景点"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是一套必须亲自开进去的空间"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 7], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "离开奥克兰之后"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "北岛不会先给你一个名场面"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是先把路线骨架亮出来"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "地热蒸汽、湖岸和不断冒出来的导航提醒"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 9], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "会让空间一层层换面"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "等车逼近黑沙海岸和鸟崖"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这条路又会突然翻成海风和悬崖"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "真正把这趟路抬到另一个尺度的，是南岛"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "普卡基、特卡波和库克山一带"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 8], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "先把视野彻底拉开"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "但等路线逼近米尔福德"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 21], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "开阔很快又会被山体、雨雾和弯道一点点压回来"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 3], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "再往后"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 19], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "皇后镇、瓦卡蒂普湖和瓦纳卡会让你意识到"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 17], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这趟穿越一直在换地形，也换人的判断"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "所以这支片子想记录的"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "不只是新西兰有多上镜"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是当你真的把车开进去以后"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这些路和天气会怎样改写想象"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "接下来，就跟我继续往里走"}
